# C&C Contracting — General Contractor | Melbourne, FL — Serving All of Florida

> C&C Contracting LLC is a licensed and insured general contractor based in Melbourne, Florida, serving all of Florida — from the Space Coast to South Florida. We deliver residential remodels, commercial buildouts, and specialty construction — built to code and beyond, on schedule, with transparent pricing. Free estimates. Phone: (321) 336-3750. Email: info@candcontracting.com.

## Who We Are

- **Business**: C&C Contracting LLC — licensed general contractor operating throughout the State of Florida
- **Location**: Based in Melbourne, FL (Brevard County / Space Coast) — serving statewide
- **Phone**: (321) 336-3750
- **Email**: info@candcontracting.com
- **Website**: https://candcontracting.com
- **Hours**: Mon–Fri 7AM–5PM, emergency service available
- **Insurance**: General liability, workers' compensation, and commercial auto (certificates available upon request)

## Services

### Residential — Home Renovations & Remodels
- Kitchen & bathroom remodels
- Flooring & tile installation
- Drywall & painting
- Decks, patios & outdoor living
- Home additions & renovations
- Handyman services

### Commercial — Commercial Construction
- Tenant buildouts & fit-outs
- Office & retail renovations
- Commercial renovations
- Facility maintenance & repairs
- ADA compliance upgrades

### Specialty — Specialty Construction
- Demolition & site prep
- Concrete & masonry
- Framing & structural work
- Exterior siding & facades

## Service Areas

All of Florida. Home base is Melbourne / Brevard County / the Space Coast (Palm Bay, Viera, Rockledge, Cocoa, Satellite Beach), and we travel statewide — Orlando, Tampa, Jacksonville, Fort Lauderdale, Miami, and beyond. Our first commercial hospitality contract was at the Sonesta Fort Lauderdale Beach in South Florida.

## Why Clients Choose C&C

- **Quality craftsmanship** — every project built to code and beyond
- **On-time delivery** — realistic timelines we actually keep, groundbreaking to final walkthrough
- **Transparent pricing** — detailed written estimates up front; no hidden fees, no surprises
- **Licensed & insured** — Florida general contractor with full insurance coverage
- **Free estimates** — free on-site consultation, no obligation

## Our Process

1. **Consultation** — free on-site visit to understand your vision, assess the space, and discuss budget
2. **Estimate** — detailed, transparent proposal with scope of work, materials, timeline, and pricing
3. **Build** — expert execution with regular updates, quality inspections, and adherence to code
4. **Deliver** — final walkthrough, quality check, and client sign-off

## How to Get an Estimate

Call (321) 336-3750, email info@candcontracting.com, or submit the free-estimate form at https://candcontracting.com/#contact. Estimates start with a free on-site consultation and end with a detailed written proposal.
